summary: Session 31 (Google Fonts auto-load) testing complete. ALL 401 TESTS PASSING (386 from Session 29 + 15 new Google Fonts tests). Verified GOOGLE_FONTS_ALLOWLIST (22 fonts), primaryFontName helper, buildGoogleFontsHref URL builder, and buildThemeFile integration with GOOGLE_FONTS_HREF export + ensureGoogleFonts() idempotent lazy-injector. App loads correctly (Emanator login page with Aurora background). Next.js HMR clean.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GOOGLE_FONTS_ALLOWLIST (lines 188-194) contains 22 common editorial/SaaS fonts
PASS: primaryFontName (lines 205-213) extracts first family from CSS font-family string
PASS: primaryFontName returns null for system/generic stacks (sans-serif, serif, monospace, system-ui, -apple-system, cursive, fantasy)
PASS: primaryFontName handles both quoted and unquoted first families
PASS: buildGoogleFontsHref (lines 227-239) returns empty string for null/empty/system-only/non-allowlist fonts
PASS: buildGoogleFontsHref returns valid css2 URL with family=<encoded>:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap
PASS: buildGoogleFontsHref dedupes when display and body are the same font (uses Set)
PASS: buildThemeFile emits GOOGLE_FONTS_HREF export constant
PASS: buildThemeFile emits ensureGoogleFonts() idempotent lazy-injector function
PASS: ensureGoogleFonts is SSR-safe (guarded by typeof document === 'undefined')
PASS: ensureGoogleFonts is idempotent (checks for data-emanator-fonts='1' attribute)
PASS: ThemeProvider calls ensureGoogleFonts via useEffect on first mount
PASS: Generated theme.js output is syntactically valid JavaScript

success_rate.frontend: N/A (unit tests only, app loads correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 31 complete. Google Fonts auto-load feature added. Key changes in lib/ai/design-tokens.js: GOOGLE_FONTS_ALLOWLIST (lines 188-194), primaryFontName (lines 205-213), buildGoogleFontsHref (lines 227-239), updated buildThemeFile (emits GOOGLE_FONTS_HREF + ensureGoogleFonts helper + ThemeProvider useEffect wiring). Jest suite now at 401/401 tests (51 in test_design_tokens.test.js, 15 new for Session 31). The font loading strategy uses display=swap (no FOIT), lazy appends to document.head on first ThemeProvider mount, and is idempotent via data-emanator-fonts='1' attribute check. Weight range 400..800 covers body + bold + display. Non-allowlist fonts silently fall back to their family stack.

coverage: includes common editorial + SaaS families (Inter, Playfair Display, Fraunces, JetBrains Mono, etc.)
extracts name from quoted first family
returns empty string when both fonts are system stacks
returns empty string when fonts are not on allowlist (prevents 404s)
emits css2 URL with display=swap for allowlisted display font
combines both fonts into a single href when both on allowlist
dedupes when display and body are the same font
emits GOOGLE_FONTS_HREF export with the resolved URL
emits empty GOOGLE_FONTS_HREF when no allowlisted fonts
ensureGoogleFonts guard is SSR-safe and idempotent

mocked_apis.note: All tests are pure unit tests. No external APIs called. Vision calls use mocked provider pattern in tests.
